item.description:
What's New

  • SEO, performance, and UX overhaul
  • add content collections, component extraction, and structured data
  • add Pagefind search, OG images, and SVG optimization
  • search tuning and visual polish
  • adopt Swift 6.2 @concurrent for scanner pipeline
  • add mobile responsive layout
  • add per-component version history pages

Fixes

  • re-init scripts on view transitions
  • correct component history deduplication and direction labels
  • correct `zip` version extraction from binary
  • correct `libxml2` version extraction from binary
  • sort kernels by filename for deterministic output
  • read version from app bundle instead of hardcoded string
  • remove kernel deduplication that dropped distinct kernelcaches

Under the Hood

  • modernize SwiftUI state management and surface errors
  • migrate to Swift Regex and remove NSString bridges
  • group identical kernel entries into single cards
